display_text: Ogre Seal Totem, Tier N / Non-Purchasable: Activate to flop forward up to 400 units twice, dealing 250 magical damage and applying a 100% slow to enemies in a 275 radius for 1.5 seconds on each impact. Provides mobile initiation and chase with two burst damage and control instances. Stats: CD: 40s, Mana Cost: 25, Bounces: 2, Leap Speed: 800, Radius: 275, Slow Duration: 1.5s.
